data.description: Vox Royalty completes $55M public offering of common shares and fulfills conditions to purchase Global Gold Portfolio.

data.title: Enigmatig partners with TVA Capital post NYSE listing, focusing on SME growth in Asia Pacific for sustainability.
data.description: Enigmatig, after becoming listed on the NYSE, has initiated a strategic partnership showcasing its focus on sustainable growth and value creation in the region. This marks their first significant action post-listing, illustrating a dedication to long-term success.

data.title: South Korean company COOCON intensifies global payment platform business, eyeing stablecoin-linked infrastructure.
data.description: COOCON, a business data platform company based in Seoul, South Korea, is intensifying its efforts in the global payment platform sector. The company aims to expand its reach worldwide by leveraging its expertise in business data analysis. This move comes as part of COOCON's strategy to capitalize on the growing market for payment platforms globally. As of now, specific details on the expansion plan and target markets remain undisclosed.

data.title: Quhuo Limited's unaudited financial results show total revenue of RMB1,131.4 million for the first half of 2025.
data.description: Quhuo Limited, a leading gig economy platform in China, reported its unaudited financial results for the first half of 2025. The company's total revenue was RMB 1,131.4 million. In the on-demand delivery sector, Quhuo focused on workforce management and operational optimization, leading to signs of market share gains relative to its key competitor since May 2025. In the housekeeping and accommodation segment, revenue grew 70.8% year over year, with gross profit up 63.4%. Chengtu, part of Quhuo's business, saw revenue grow by 83.6% and gross profit surge by 390.8%, achieving a gross margin of 55.2%. The company aims to enhance profitability further and expects economies of scale to materialize in the second half of 2025.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. finishes 2025 equity issuances with a block equity trade through its ATM program.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Black Hills Corp. (NYSE: BKH) disclosed that it successfully completed a block equity transaction utilizing its at-the-market (“ATM”) equity offering initiative to address its outstanding equity requirements for the year 2025.

data.title: Dominican Republic construction industry to decline by 1.2% in 2025, with predicted 4.1% AAGR from 2026-2029.
data.description: A recent report on the Dominican Republic construction market, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, predicts a decline of 1.2% in real terms for the industry in 2025. This dip comes despite a slowdown in inflation and stabilization of material prices in the latter half of the year, following price increases in the first half of 2025. The construction market sectors analyzed include commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential segments.

data.title: Wall Street analysts predict Carnival Corporation to report Q3 earnings of $1.32 per share and revenue of $8.11 billion, up from $1.27/share and $7.9 billion in the year-ago period respectively.
data.description: Carnival Corporation (NYSE: CCL) is set to report its third-quarter earnings on Monday, Sept. 29, before the market opens. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.32 per share, an increase from $1.27 per share in the same period last year. The Miami-headquartered company is expected to announce quarterly revenue of $8.11 billion, up from $7.9 billion in the previous year. In the second quarter, Carnival reported adjusted earnings per share of 35 cents, surpassing the consensus estimate of 24 cents. Quarterly sales reached $6.328 billion, beating the expected $6.207 billion. Following this news, Carnival's shares saw a 0.4% rise, closing at $30.48 on Thursday. For more details and analyst ratings, interested readers can find the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: $3.6M withdrawn from Hypervault DeFi platform in abnormal event. Social media and website inaccessible after funds directed to Tornado Cash.
data.description: Following an incident, Hypervault Finance's social media accounts and website are currently inaccessible. This issue arose when user funds were mistakenly transferred to Tornado Cash.

data.title: Sify Infinit Spaces Limited potential IPO of INR 10 par value Equity Shares approved by board on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Chennai, India, on September 25, 2025, the board of directors of Sify Infinit Spaces Limited ("SISL"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Sify Technologies Limited ("Sify"), authorized a potential initial public offering ("IPO") of equity shares of SISL with a par value of INR 10 each. This decision was disclosed to BSE Ltd., and the information regarding the IPO intention was published on the exchange's website.
